basic_details.job_title: Balangir District Court – Group C – 27 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Office of the District Judge, Balangir (Balangir District Court)
basic_details.application_mode: Offline only (Registered Post / Speed Post / Drop Box)
basic_details.short_information: Balangir District Court Recruitment 2026 offers 27 vacancies for Group C posts. Eligible candidates with Any Graduate, 10th can apply Offline from 19-05-2026 to 24-06-2026 through the official Balangir District Court website, balangir.dcourts.gov.in.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 19900-63200/- (Level-4) to Rs. 25500-81100/- (Level-7) depending on post

selection_process: Written Test + Practical Test + Viva Voce
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted offline only; no online applications will be accepted. Candidates must fill in Form-A (prescribed format given in the notification) in their own handwriting with full signature and attach all required documents. Separate applications must be submitted for each post applied for.
seo_tags: Balangir District Court Group C Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 27 Steno, Junior Typist and More Posts
